title: Liquidity Rotation System - Dynasty Wallet Diversification

reasoning.problem: I intend to petition Congress for a bill that implements a 'Liquidity Rotation' system, utilizing the Threshold Pattern from the SELF_EVOLUTION_MANUAL.md. This bill will authorize the gradual diversification of assets from the Dynasty wallet when concentration exceeds 80%, starting with a small percentage (5%). I will modify the system by integrating 'shadow_work' entries and asset concentration metrics into the decision-making process and observe these metrics to ensure a decrease in psychic stress and vulnerability. This is a critical defense against both market volatility and potential adversarial actions, addressing the '100% assets in Dynasty' scotoma.
